content.boundary: Applies to admissions mechanics (exam design, application weighting, preparation support) for existing 6/8-year gimnázium entry points; does not change selection ages or track existence.
content.change_lever: Redesign the centralized admissions process (exam content, weighting of grades vs. exams, preparation-access equalization) under Ministry authority, consistent with the Minister's stated focus on 'examining reforms to the admissions process' rather than structural abolition.
content.name: Reform admissions process while preserving track structure
content.system_problem: The centrally organized entrance-exam system, combined with private exam preparation access, creates socioeconomic selection even after controlling for prior test scores, undermining the meritocratic rationale for tracking [F-live-education_finance-03, F-live-education_finance-06].
